## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between GrowthX and Homebase teams to discuss content strategy, introduce new team members, and review Atlas platform capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New GrowthX team members introduced: Jakub (Managing Director) and Andi (Head of Customer Operations)](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Atlas platform demo showcased improved content generation workflows and customization options](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Plans to move "How to start a business in X state" content to a new subfolder, redirecting existing URLs](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [All 50 state pages for "How to Calculate Payroll" are ready for publication](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Role Updates

  - [Jakub Rudnik: New Managing Director with 10+ years of content/SEO experience, focusing on strategy and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [Andi Bailey: Head of Customer Operations, overseeing implementation of Atlas platform](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Both aim to accelerate growth and improve collaboration with Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

### Content Performance and Reporting

  - [Glossary content performing well](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Jess working on V1 dashboard, needs Amplitude access from Homebase team](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [5 TLDRs ready for review, 5 more in production (10 total by end of week)](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

### "How to Start a Business in X State" Content Strategy

  - [Proposed outline and visual mockup shared for review](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Decision to move content from blog to new subfolder](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Jakub recommends redirecting all existing state pages to new location](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Mark confirms low traffic impact, sees it as "starting with a clean slate"](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)

### Atlas Platform Demo and Workflow Improvements

  - [Showed Homebase workspace in Atlas, including artifacts (audience personas, company context, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Demonstrated article generation pipeline with customizable inputs and outputs](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Discussed potential for refining internal linking process through Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)

### Content Publication and SEO Strategy

  - [All 50 "How to Calculate Payroll" state pages ready for publication](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Jakub recommends publishing all 50 pages at once, given site maturity](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Team to monitor indexing post-publication](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)

### Collaboration and Communication Improvements

  - [Plans for more frequent, ad-hoc working sessions to iterate quickly](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Increased use of Slack for faster feedback and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule 1-hour deep dive meeting with Carrie to discuss product directions and strategy reset](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Sonia to add product buckets to glossary terms in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Jess to follow up on missing meta descriptions for state pages](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Mark to finalize page structure for informational PSEO content](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Team to explore potential workflow for improving internal linking across site](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Increase use of Slack channel for more rapid feedback and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/suHomR-zwsc1npEmjzzbxajFsR_xwRPs?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
